mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, IFNULL(p.safe_stock, 0) AS safetyStock, IFNULL(SUM(s.count), 0) AS currentStock FROM erp_product p LEFT JOIN erp_stock s ON p.id = s.product_id AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.safe_stock HAVING IFNULL(SUM(s.count), 0) < IFNULL(p.safe_stock, 0)
SELECT * FROM erp_purchase_ai_suggest WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time = ( SELECT MAX(create_time) FROM erp_purchase_ai_suggest WHERE deleted = 0 ) ORDER BY id DESC
